summary: "Hunt HTTP request smuggling (CL.TE, TE.CL, H2.CL, H2.TE). Cause: front-end proxy and back-end server disagree on where one request ends and the next begins (Content-Length vs Transfer-Encoding header
preconditions: Skill hunt-http-smuggling has been invoked locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals matching hunt-http-smuggling
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow
Abort if any validation step fails
Record the outcome as a Capsule on success
